subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth and made them clear proofs unto all who are in the heavens and on earth, whereby He giveth life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و جعلها بینات لمن فی السموات و الارضین بها احیی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
